title: Folder-Level Processing Rules
description: Schema for <folder>/_processing-rules.json distributed across vault; resolved by writer-reconciler at reconciliation time (NOT pre-discovery by writers). Precedence: folder-level > file-type-contracts > universal pillar 7 defaults. Per Plan 81 SP13 Session 4 A36. Authored by SP14 Batch A T-14.4 (2026-05-18).

posture.description: Per-destination-folder declaration of write posture. direct = writer writes directly to destination (default). staged = writer emits packets to ~/.claude/state/vault-staging/; reconciler picks up and writes canonical destination.

dedup.description: Folder-level dedup strategy override. Falls back to file-type-contracts then universal pillar 7 default.

applies_to.description: Inheritance scope. this-folder-and-subfolders = subfolders inherit unless they declare their own _processing-rules.json override.
